poorExperience.title: The Risk of Human Error
poorExperience.description: In law, a formal error is fatal. Manual drafting in states of fatigue multiplies the risk of critical failures in documents where precision is non-negotiable.

opportunityCost.title: Economic Spillage (Opportunity Cost)
opportunityCost.description: Spending hours building a single brief is a financial error. Every minute dedicated to artisanal drafting is time stolen from senior management, the study of new cases, and the growth of your firm.

solution.title: You Govern. We Process.

hitl.title: Human Sovereignty (HITL)
hitl.description: You act as the Architect of the strategy; our system acts as the Builder. No document is final without your explicit validation (Human-in-the-Loop), ensuring that professional control always remains in your hands.

orchestration.title: Immediate Judicial Orchestration
orchestration.description: Eliminate the blank page block through algorithmic orchestration designed to structure solid arguments in seconds. What once required an entire afternoon of technical drafting is now resolved in minutes of executive review.

faq.title: Operational Clarity and Privacy Guarantee
faq.description: Absolute transparency about our engineering infrastructure and the treatment of your strategic information.

q1.question: How is Documentos.legal different from tools like ChatGPT?
q1.answer: Unlike a generic chatbot, we are a specialized document engineering platform using Hexagonal Architecture. We don't rely on a single model; our native orchestrator dynamically selects the best engine (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, or Gemini) for each section of the document. Each workflow is designed with judicial rigor, ensuring a structure and tone that a conventional chat cannot replicate.

q2.question: How secure are my data and strategy?
q2.answer: We implement the Incinerator Protocol: we treat client data as "toxic waste" that must be destroyed after processing. All infrastructure resides on Microsoft Azure, where files are permanently deleted automatically 60 minutes after creation. Your strategic data is never used to train AI models nor exposed to the public internet.

q3.question: Can I trust the technical accuracy of the documents?
q3.answer: The system delivers drafts with 95% court-readiness, but you retain absolute sovereignty. We operate under a Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) model: you validate extracted data before generation and perform the final review before download.

q4.question: Do I need "Prompt Engineering" knowledge?
q4.answer: No; our job is the "Digital Plumbing". You only provide your strategic knowledge and key arguments; our platform handles the complex engineering in the background to translate your intent into a professional document.

q5.question: How does the credit cost model work?
q5.answer: We reject the model of unnecessary subscriptions; you only buy what you need via industrial "Supply Packs". Each generation transparently consumes credits (e.g., a complex lawsuit consumes approx. 50 credits), allowing you to pay only for the final results delivered.

contact.title: Ready to scale your strategic capability?
contact.subtitle: If you require a corporate implementation or advanced technical validation, our engineering team is available to coordinate your deployment.

q1.question: What exactly is documentos.legal and how does it differ from a generic AI chat?
q1.answer: We are not a chat assistant, but an Industrial Document Engineering platform. Unlike generic AIs that can hallucinate, our system uses an orchestration architecture (SAGA Pattern) and a multi-model router that selects the best intelligence for specific legal tasks. We focus on Cognitive Relief: eliminating the lawyer's administrative burden, not just generating text.

q2.question: What exactly does "Document Engineering" mean?
q2.answer: It is the application of software engineering principles to the creation of legal documents. This includes precise entity extraction, logical structuring of arguments, and format normalization, ensuring that 95% of the document is ready for court before you review it.

q3.question: Which sectors is the platform optimized for?
q3.answer: Currently, the system is calibrated exclusively for the legal sector: independent litigators, medium-sized firms, and in-house legal departments operating under Central and Latin American regulations.

q4.question: Do I need "prompt engineering" knowledge or advanced technology?
q4.answer: No. Our philosophy is "Time off site". We have replaced complex commands with an intuitive Strategic Intent Selector. You only define the legal objective (e.g., "Answer a lawsuit") and the system takes care of the technical execution.

q1.question: Are my confidential data and strategies secure?
q1.answer: We implement the Incinerator Protocol. We treat client information as toxic waste: it is processed and destroyed immediately. Your original files and drafts have a maximum life cycle of 60 minutes before being physically deleted from our Azure servers.

q2.question: Are my documents used to train AI models?
q2.answer: Absolutely not. Our infrastructure is stateless. We do not store document "libraries" or feed global models with your intellectual property. Privacy is not an option, it is a technical constraint of our economic model.

q1.question: Can I trust the technical accuracy of the drafts?
q1.answer: The system is designed for rigor, but operates under the principle of Human Sovereignty (HITL). You are the architect; the AI is the builder. No document is considered final without your explicit validation through our side-by-side review interface.

q2.question: What is "Human-in-the-Loop" (HITL) and why is it mandatory?
q2.answer: It means the human is always at the center of the workflow. The system presents the evidence and the draft simultaneously for you to approve, reject, or refine each section. Our promise is "We grind, you govern".

q1.question: How can I start using the platform?
q1.answer: You can start with our Founder’s Grant: 50 free credits upon verifying your profile. This allows you to generate a complete lawsuit or five lease contracts to validate the quality of the system with no initial cost.

q2.question: Do you offer plans for law firms or multiple users?
q2.answer: We do not use monthly subscriptions that become "forgotten software". We sell Industrial Supply Packs of pre-paid credits (Solo, Firm, and Factory) that do not expire and allow total control of operating spending.

q3.question: In which regions is the service available?
q3.answer: We are operational for the Central American market, with specific optimization for Costa Rica, Guatemala, Panama, and El Salvador. The service is available 24/7 thanks to our serverless architecture.

overview.title: Judicial-Grade Document Engineering
overview.description: We substitute artisan drafting with high-precision engineering processes, allowing you to focus your intellect on strategy while we process the technical load.

draftingEngine.title: 1. The Drafting Engine
draftingEngine.description: It is our flagship tool for building complex arguments. It acts as a "Constructor" that translates your strategic guidelines into documents structured with judicial rigor.
draftingEngine.capabilities: Generation of Answers to Complaints, Civil Complaints, and Appeal Resources.
draftingEngine.rigor: Structuring of arguments with impeccable tone and normative precision.

infrastructure.title: 3. Infrastructure and Security: The Incinerator Protocol
infrastructure.description: The technical foundation guaranteeing your strategic information is never permanently stored.
infrastructure.totalDeletion: All client files and secrets are automatically eliminated 60 minutes after processing.
infrastructure.orchestration: We use a native orchestrator that dynamically selects the best models via Microsoft AI Foundry.
infrastructure.architecture: Our business logic is isolated from external providers to guarantee stability and banking-grade security.

process.title: The Technical Execution Cycle
process.description: A transparent process designed to prioritize user sovereignty and data integrity at every stage.

step1.title: Ingestion and Strategic Command
step1.description: You provide the source material (PDF, DOCX) and define the strategic guideline through our intent selector. The system acts as your "Constructor," preparing the document architecture based on your specific instructions.

step2.title: Extraction and Validation (HITL 1: No Blind Validation)
step2.description: Our architecture processes the source document and extracts key metadata and entities. Before proceeding, you validate this information via a split view (Source-Action Flow), ensuring the system does not work on incorrect data.

step3.title: Multi-LLM Orchestration and Construction
step3.description: The validated draft is processed by our native orchestrator, which dynamically selects the most suitable model (GPT-4o, Claude, or Gemini) via Microsoft AI Foundry. This engineering layer ensures impeccable judicial tone and solid argumentative structure.

step4.title: Final Refinement and Incineration (HITL 2)
step4.description: The generated document (95% court-ready) is presented for your final review. You can make manual adjustments or request specific refinements before download. Upon download, the Incinerator Protocol is activated: all evidence and the draft are permanently deleted from our servers within 60 minutes.

technologies.title: Bank-Grade Architecture and Native Execution
technologies.description: We are built on a proprietary infrastructure designed for stability, data sovereignty, and operational efficiency.

foundation.title: The Foundation: Hexagonal Architecture
foundation.description: Our platform utilizes a Hexagonal Architecture (Ports & Adapters) that decouples legal business logic from technical infrastructure. This modular structure allows us to flexibly orchestrate the best microservices and AI models on the market via Microsoft AI Foundry, ensuring your firm always operates with state-of-the-art (SOTA) technology without obsolescence risk.

security.title: Sovereignty and Security on Azure
security.description: Our entire operation resides exclusively within the secure Microsoft Azure environment (SOC Certified). By processing documents in isolated, stateless containers, we guarantee that your strategic information is never used to train public models and remains protected under the most rigorous compliance standards.

efficiency.title: Scale-to-Zero Efficiency
efficiency.description: We operate under a Scale-to-Zero financial and technical model. Our infrastructure only activates when you are processing a document, eliminating unnecessary costs and allowing us to offer a competitive cost advantage passed directly to our supply packs.

techStack.title: The Technology Arsenal (Industrial Stack)
techStack.intro: To project technical seriousness, we present the tools that support the "Digital Plumbing" of documentos.legal:
techStack.businessLogic: Business Logic: C# / .NET 8 Core (Industrial rigor and stability).
techStack.intelligence: Intelligence: Python / Azure AI Services (Advanced natural language processing).
techStack.orchestration: Orchestration: Dapr (Microservices coordination and SAGA flows).
techStack.infrastructure: Infrastructure: Azure Container Apps / Docker (Scalable and secure deployment).
techStack.security: Security: Incinerator Protocol (Automatic data destruction in 60 min).

benefit3.impact: Big firm capacity for independent professionals and medium-sized teams.

benefit4.impact: Bank-grade security that transcends national borders.

hero.title: Where strategic intuition meets precision engineering.
hero.subtitle: Document Engineering
hero.description: We are a global deep-tech company. We unite a robust hexagonal architecture with cutting-edge AI to ensure experts focus on deciding and winning, not on writing.

mission.title: Our Mission: Cognitive Load Relief.
mission.headline: We grind administrative work. You govern the law.
mission.description: The mission of Documentos.legal is to eradicate the administrative "plumbing" that suffocates the practice of law. We do not sell artificial intelligence as an end; we sell time and institutional safety. Our reason for being is for the lawyer to regain their strategic capacity, delegating the drafting, paginating, and redaction of documents to a precision infrastructure that guarantees immediate cognitive relief.

vision.title: Our Vision: The Invisible Infrastructure.
vision.headline: To be the standard of reliability for modern justice.
vision.description: We aspire to be the invisible and essential infrastructure that allows the legal system to function without operational friction. We do not seek to capture user attention, but to disappear within their workflow once the task is done. We visualize a future where law is practiced through human strategic decisions, supported by a technological architecture that processes drudgery and destroys evidence, reducing data liability to zero.

values.title: Architectural Values: The Pillars of Infrastructure.

rigor.title: 1. Engineering Rigor: No "Black Boxes".
rigor.body: We reject the narrative of AI as magic. We operate under a Hexagonal Architecture that decouples legal logic from external interfaces, guaranteeing stability and auditable processes. We are not a third-party wrapper; we own our proprietary code "Chassis", built to offer predictability in high-responsibility environments.

sovereignty.title: 2. Human Sovereignty (HITL): Force Multiplier.
sovereignty.body: Technology is a precision tool, never a substitute for expert judgment. Our "Human-in-the-Loop" architecture ensures you retain absolute control over final validation. The system performs the administrative heavy lifting so that the professional acts exclusively as the architect of the strategy.

trust.title: 3. Structural Trust: The Incinerator Protocol.
trust.body: Security is not a promise, it is a technical impossibility of leakage. Through Binary Separation and the Incinerator Protocol, confidential data is processed in an ephemeral environment with a 60-minute lifespan. By using armored Azure infrastructure, we guarantee that evidence is physically destroyed after each session.

speed.title: 4. Speed Economy: Win, Don't Stay.
speed.body: We don't measure success by "Time on Site", but by "Download Speed". We optimize the system so you get a perfect document and leave the platform as soon as possible. Real value is measured in results: lawsuits won, contracts closed, and immediate cognitive relief.

origin.title: The Origin: Engineering for "Digital Plumbing".
origin.body: We were not born from theory, but from a raw observation: elite professionals consumed by administrative "drudgery". We identified that the gap between legal strategy and final drafting was a system error that had to be patched. Documentos.legal is the industrial answer to that friction; we don't sell "magic", we sell cognitive relief through infrastructure.

vba.title: The VBA Model: Stability and Scale-to-Zero.
vba.body: We are a Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of Cyboring Technologies LLC, operating under the Venture Builder Autonomous (VBA) model. We are not an experimental startup, but the product of an "Agentic Assembly Line" designed to produce industrial-grade software. Our "Scale-to-Zero" architecture guarantees that we only consume resources when you generate revenue, ensuring asymmetric financial viability against traditional competitors.

philosophy.title: Philosophy: The Economy of Apathy.
philosophy.body: We reject the "Time on Site" metric. We optimize for download speed: success is measured by how quickly you can leave our platform with a perfect legal result. We are here so you can stop writing and start governing.

ephemeral.title: 60 Minutes: Ephemeral Data Persistence.
ephemeral.body: Under the Incinerator Protocol, confidential information has a maximum lifecycle of one hour. Physical deletion at the infrastructure level in Azure ensures that your data liability is reduced to zero after every work session.

availability.title: 99.9%+: Availability on Armored Infrastructure.
availability.body: We operate on Microsoft Azure to offer bank-grade resilience and enterprise standard compliance. Our native hexagonal architecture ensures unwavering stability and massive scalability for critical litigation processes.

zero_storage.title: 0% Secrets Storage.
zero_storage.body: We reject the traditional data "warehouse" model; we are an industrial processing pipeline. Your information is not saved to be exploited, it is transformed: once the result is delivered, the system physically destroys any trace of the original source.

speed.title: Maximum Download Speed.
speed.body: Our success metric is "Time Off Site". We optimize the system so that the professional spends the least amount of time possible on the platform, achieving documents that are 95% court-ready in a fraction of the usual time.

standards.title: Certifications of Robustness and Human Sovereignty.

hitl.title: HITL Guarantee: You Govern, We Grind.
hitl.body: At Documentos.legal, the human expert retains absolute sovereignty over every document produced. The system operates under strict Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) control, where no draft is finalized without your explicit validation. This architecture allows the professional to act as the Architect of the strategy while the system acts as the Constructor, ensuring that the result is 95% court-ready before download.

agnostic.title: Agnostic Intelligence: Microsoft AI Foundry.
agnostic.body: Our platform does not rely on a single AI provider; we use an agnostic orchestrator that dynamically selects the most efficient model (GPT-4o, Claude 3.5, or Gemini) through Microsoft AI Foundry. This allows optimizing accuracy according to the complexity of the legal argument and ensures service continuity in the face of any external failure.

resilience.title: Infrastructure Resilience: Azure and Hexagonal Design.
resilience.body: We are built on Azure Container Apps, guaranteeing enterprise-grade security and a "Scale-to-Zero" architecture that eliminates unnecessary costs. We implement a native Hexagonal Architecture to decouple legal logic from external interfaces, ensuring our infrastructure is as stable and predictable as the justice system itself.

incineratorProtocol.title: The Incinerator Protocol Doctrine: The End of Data Liability.

item1.title: We treat your documents like toxic waste: process and destroy.
item1.description: At Documentos.legal, confidentiality is not a contractual promise; it is a technical impossibility. Under the Incinerator Protocol, all confidential information has a maximum lifecycle of 60 minutes. We are not a data warehouse, but a processing pipeline: files are ingested, transformed, and evidence is physically deleted from our servers automatically.

item2.title: The Binary Split Architecture.
item2.description: Our infrastructure strictly divides business data (billing and access) from product data (your secrets). While your account remains secure on our platform, the processing environment is totally ephemeral and vanishes upon session termination.

item3.title: Deletion guaranteed by infrastructure, not code.
item3.description: Data destruction is engraved in the DNA of our Azure cloud. Lifecycle policies delete files one hour after upload, without human intervention and without exceptions. If the server is empty, your legal liability drops to zero. We fix your documents and destroy the evidence.

cta.title: Eliminate operational friction today.
cta.subtitle: Your first strategic draft is 60 seconds away.
cta.description: Join the professionals who have stopped writing to start deciding. Under the Incinerator Protocol, your privacy is guaranteed by architecture, not by promises. Start your ephemeral session now and receive 50 complimentary credits to process your first lawsuit or contract. No subscriptions, no "projects"; just precision engineering for immediate legal results.

hero.description: Transactional access via credits. $0.10 per unit. Documents are processed and incinerated in 60 minutes
hero.microcopy: No credit card required. Identity verification only

creditSystem.title: Credits: The Measurement Unit of Effort
creditSystem.description: Not all documents require the same computational rigor. Processing a simple notification does not have the same cost as constructing a complex civil complaint from multiple evidence sources. That's why we use Credits: a transparent metric that reflects the exact technical work of the AI.
creditSystem.microcopy1: Costs are estimates based on average length and processing. The platform will always show the exact cost in credits before confirming generation.
creditSystem.microcopy2: No forced subscriptions. You acquire the credit inventory your practice requires.

packages.description: No subscriptions or recurring charges. Acquire credits according to your workflow volume. Inventory does not expire and adjusts to your professional pace.

faq.title: Operational Clarity on Your Investment
faq.description: Institutional answers regarding the credit system, document inventory management, and transaction security.

q1.question: How does the credit system work compared to a subscription?
q1.answer: Documentos.legal operates on a purely transactional model. You do not pay a monthly rent; you acquire an inventory of credits that you consume based on your actual demand. This eliminates resource waste ('shelfware') and aligns your cost directly with the value produced.

q2.question: Do credits expire if I don't use them in the month?
q2.answer: No. As an industrial supply of engineering, your credits have no monthly expiration. They remain in your account as available inventory until you decide to use them to process a document.

q3.question: Are there permanence contracts or long-term commitments?
q3.answer: No. The platform is 'Scale-to-Zero': there is only an economic commitment when you decide to make a credit load. You can stop using the service at any time without cancellation procedures.

q4.question: Can I get volume discounts for my firm?
q4.answer: Yes. The system is designed to reward scale. Packages like 'The Factory Pack' offer up to 30% savings per unit, reducing the cost per credit from $0.10 to $0.07.

q5.question: How can I test the quality of the engineering before buying?
q5.answer: Every new user receives the 'Founder's Grant': 50 free credits after verifying their identity. This allows you to process a complete civil complaint or multiple contracts without economic risk, validating our precision before any investment.

q6.question: What is the refund policy?
q6.answer: Due to immediate computational processing costs and the use of high-end AI models, refunds are not offered for consumed credits. The 50-credit Founder's Grant exists precisely so you can perform all necessary tests without initial cost.

cta.title: Integration for High-Volume Firms
cta.description: If your operation requires a custom implementation, API integrations, or a volume exceeding 5,000 monthly credits, our engineering team is available to coordinate your professional infrastructure.
cta.microcopy: Direct engineering attention. No sales intermediaries.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: Cyboring Hexagonal Technologies LLC ("Cyboring", "we", "us", or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our document engineering platform and related services.

informationCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationCollect.intro: We collect information that you provide directly to us and information we obtain automatically when you use our Services:

items.personal: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, billing information, and professional details you provide when creating an account or using our services.
items.usage: Usage Data: Information about how you interact with our platform, including documents processed, features used, and time spent on the platform.
items.device: Device Information: IP address, browser type, operating system, and device identifiers.
items.cookies: Cookies and Tracking: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience and analyze platform usage.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect to:

items.provide: Provide, maintain, and improve our document engineering services.
items.improve: Develop new features and enhance user experience.
items.communicate: Send you technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages.
items.security: Detect, prevent, and address technical issues and security threats.
items.legal: Comply with legal obligations and enforce our terms of service.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. All data is processed within Microsoft Azure's enterprise-grade infrastructure with SOC 2 Type II certification. Your documents and strategic information are encrypted in transit and at rest, and are never exposed to the public internet or used to train AI models.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing and Disclosure
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your information only in the following circumstances:

items.providers: Service Providers: With trusted third-party service providers who assist us in operating our platform, subject to confidentiality obligations.
items.legal: Legal Requirements: When required by law, subpoena, or other legal process, or to protect the rights and safety of Cyboring, our users, or others.
items.business: Business Transfers: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of the transaction.

yourRights.title: Your Rights and Choices
yourRights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:

items.access: Access: Request access to the personal information we hold about you.
items.correction: Correction: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete information.
items.deletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal information, subject to certain exceptions.
items.portability: Portability: Request a copy of your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
items.optOut: Opt-Out: Opt out of marketing communications at any time.

cookies.title: Cookies and Tracking Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to collect information about your browsing activities. You can control cookies through your browser settings, though disabling certain cookies may limit your ability to use some features of our platform.

children.title: Children's Privacy
children.content: Our Services are not directed to children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: Changes to This Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of our Services after any changes indicates your acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.introduction: Welcome to Cyboring. These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the Cyboring document engineering platform and related services ("Services") provided by Cyboring Hexagonal Technologies LLC ("Cyboring", "we", "us", or "our"). Please read these Terms carefully before using our Services.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using our Services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to these Terms, you may not access or use our Services. If you are using the Services on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

description.title: 2. Description of Services
description.content: Cyboring provides a document engineering platform that uses artificial intelligence to help professionals create, analyze, and process documents. Our Services include document generation, metadata extraction, compliance checking, and other related features. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of our Services at any time.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.intro: To access certain features of our Services, you must create an account. When you create an account, you agree to:

items.accurate: Provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration.
items.security: Maintain the security of your password and account credentials.
items.notify: Notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account.
items.responsible: Be responsible for all activities that occur under your account.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.intro: You agree not to use our Services to:

items.illegal: Violate any applicable laws, regulations, or third-party rights.
items.harmful: Upload or transmit viruses, malware, or other harmful code.
items.infringe: Infringe upon intellectual property rights of others.
items.interfere: Interfere with or disrupt the integrity or performance of our Services.
items.unauthorized: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems or other users' accounts.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: The Services and all content, features, and functionality are owned by Cyboring and are protected by international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of our Services without our prior written consent.

userContent.title: 6. User Content
userContent.content: You retain ownership of any documents and content you upload to our platform ("User Content"). By uploading User Content, you grant Cyboring a limited license to process your content solely for the purpose of providing our Services to you. We do not use your User Content to train our AI models or share it with third parties except as necessary to provide the Services.

payment.title: 7. Payment Terms
payment.content: Certain features of our Services require payment. You agree to pay all fees associated with your chosen plan. Fees are non-refundable except as required by law or as explicitly stated in our refund policy. We reserve the right to change our pricing with reasonable notice.

termination.title: 8. Termination
termination.content: We may terminate or suspend your access to our Services immediately, without prior notice, for any reason, including if you breach these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Services will cease immediately. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us.

disclaimer.title: 9. Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: THE SERVICES ARE PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. CYBORING DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICES WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, OR SECURE.

liability.title: 10. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, CYBORING SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, OR GOODWILL, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO YOUR USE OF THE SERVICES. OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT YOU PAID US IN THE TWELVE MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM.

indemnification.title: 11. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Cyboring and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including attorneys' fees) arising out of your use of the Services, your User Content, or your violation of these Terms.

governingLaw.title: 12. Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, United States, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be resolved in the state or federal courts located in Delaware.

changes.title: 13. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of material changes by posting the updated Terms on our website and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Services after changes become effective constitutes your acceptance of the revised Terms.

contact.title: 14. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
